goal: Add real CUDA lora_adapter artifact intake verification and require that verification in the real adapter endpoint evidence path, so M6-RC cannot be marked GO from marker-shaped markdown or fixture adapters. The verifier must reject fixture-sized/minimal adapters, require PEFT LoRA metadata for locked v0 base models, validate safetensors tensor content, optionally validate training manifest lineage, and update capture/RC verification tooling to require adapter_intake_verified: true. This gate does not provide a real adapter and must preserve current M6-RC NOT_GO.
head: a0d847b
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC GO before real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists
Weakening real adapter or endpoint evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add adapter-intake verification tooling, focused tests, generated tooling evidence, and handoff updates only.
required_evidence: verify_real_adapter_artifact.py accepts a structurally real-like PEFT LoRA adapter fixture in tests
capture_real_adapter_endpoint_evidence.py requires a GO intake report for live evidence
verify_m6_rc_evidence.py requires adapter_intake_verified: true and still reports current NOT_GO
warnings: This gate does not provide a real trained adapter.
This gate does not run live Docker endpoint transcripts.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until a live endpoint evidence file with adapter_intake_verified: true and self_test: false exists.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped tooling contract for real adapter artifact intake verification.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING.md, capture_real_adapter_endpoint_evidence.py, verify_m6_rc_evidence.py, export/training adapter metadata references, and current evidence. Found endpoint marker verification lacks a real adapter artifact intake prerequisite.
phase_notes.build: Add adapter intake verifier, connect capture and M6 verifier to adapter_intake_verified marker, and add focused tests.
phase_notes.check: Contract JSON validation, py_compile, focused tests, adapter intake self-test, endpoint capture self-test, M6 RC verifier, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: Adapter intake tooling is recorded in artifacts/review/real_adapter_artifact_intake_evidence.md. Endpoint evidence now requires adapter_intake_verified: true, and current M6-RC remains NOT_GO because no live real adapter endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Adapter intake tooling, endpoint evidence tooling integration, focused tests, generated evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
